channel.title: Courses Overview :: Architools
channel.description: A structured overview of courses focusing on Bio-Climate Design, Building Information Modeling (BIM), and Parametric Design.

item.title: Bio-Climate
item.author: yaniv@hatiel.com (Yaniv Hatiel)
item.description: Study of environmental design strategies and their integration into architectural projects.

item.title: Building Information Modeling (BIM)
item.author: yaniv@hatiel.com (Yaniv Hatiel)
item.description: In-depth training on BIM concepts and their implementation in architectural practice using Revit.

item.title: Parametric Design
item.author: yaniv@hatiel.com (Yaniv Hatiel)
item.description: Comprehensive training in parametric design principles and techniques using Grasshopper.
